title: Buddy Holly
why_this_song: Buddy Holly by Weezer (1994) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "I don't care what they say about us anyway"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I don't care what they say about us anyway"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "What's with these homies, dissing my girl?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And I know you're mine"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "But you know I'm yours"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Don't you ever fear, I'm always near
I know that you need help
Your tongue is twisted, your eyes are slit
Bang, bang, a knock on the door
Another big bang and you're down on the floor

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "care" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "care" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: What's with these homies, dissing my girl?
I know that you need help
Oh no! What do we do?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I can't run, and I can't kick

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Buddy Holly", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Buddy Holly", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Buddy Holly" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Buddy Holly" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Buddy Holly" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Buddy Holly", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
